title: Add make depend, no build if there are no changes
body:
Generate depend files for make, using a `go list` script.

Also .gopathok cannot be phony, that rebuilds every time.

@afbjorklund You need to sign your commits.
Signed. Think I prefer the external DCO handling
LGTM, but would like a head nod from @baude

Too many environment variables (like tags) makes this dependency generation unreliable for podman.

See https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1252#issuecomment-450853620
